name: web-business-3-root
description: Monorepo for Business Hub frontend and backend

scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run start-backend" "wait-on tcp:3001 && npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.preview: npm run build && concurrently "npx serve -s frontend/dist -p 3000" "npm run start-backend"
